_comment: Recommended MCP servers for the Foundation AddOn. Copy relevant entries into your project's .mcp.json or ~/.claude.json
_WARNING: NEVER commit .mcp.json with real credentials. Add .mcp.json to your project's .gitignore.

_tiers.tier1_core: Install first — zero API keys, universal value
_tiers.tier2_enhanced: High value, some need free API keys

context7._why: Fetches up-to-date, version-specific docs for any library. Eliminates hallucinated API syntax. Add 'use context7' to any prompt.

filesystem._why: Sandboxed file operations scoped to allowed directories. 14 tools for read/write/search/move.

git._why: Native git operations — status, diffs, commits, branches, log. No shell required.

playwright._why: Browser automation via accessibility tree. Navigate, click, fill forms, capture screenshots. Official Microsoft implementation.

memory._why: Persistent knowledge graph as JSONL. Remembers decisions, preferences, conventions across sessions.

fetch._why: Lightweight URL fetcher — converts HTML to clean markdown. Zero API keys.

sequential-thinking._why: Structured problem-solving — numbered steps, revision, branching. Prevents jumping to conclusions on hard problems.

mcpServers._tier2_enhanced: === TIER 2: HIGH-VALUE ENHANCED (some need API keys) ===

github._why: Full GitHub integration — PRs, issues, Actions, code search, Dependabot alerts.

tavily._why: AI-optimized web search + page extraction + site mapping. Purpose-built for developer queries.

postgres._why: Direct SQL execution, schema inspection, query debugging against PostgreSQL.
postgres._WARNING: NEVER hardcode credentials in args. Use DATABASE_URL env var instead.

bitwarden._why: Secure credential retrieval from your self-hosted Vaultwarden instance. Lets Claude access dev secrets without exposing them in files, env vars, or chat. Use a SCOPED dev account/org — never your personal vault.
bitwarden._install: npm install -g @bitwarden/mcp-server (or use bw CLI directly)
_security_notes: REQUIRES separate dev vault account or organization — see vaultwarden/VAULT_ORGANIZATION.md
Session token (BW_SESSION) is short-lived — locks when shell exits
Configure bw CLI to point at your Vaultwarden: bw config server https://vault.lan
MCP server reads from BW_SESSION env var — never stores credentials on disk
Combine with the .claude/settings.json deny rules to prevent vault dumping via prompt injection

docker._why: Container lifecycle management — build, run, inspect, manage containers.

sentry._why: Error tracking — retrieves stack traces, error frequencies, proposes fixes using repo context.

firecrawl._why: Advanced web scraping with JS rendering. Handles SPAs and dynamic sites that fetch can't.

qdrant._why: Vector storage and semantic retrieval for RAG. Long-term semantic memory beyond keyword search.
